things.name: Victoria Memorial
things.description: Magnificent white marble memorial to Queen Victoria housing an excellent museum of the Raj

things.name: Howrah Bridge
things.description: Iconic 1943 cantilever bridge over the Hooghly River - one of the busiest in the world

things.name: Dakshineswar Kali Temple
things.description: 19th-century temple on the Hooghly associated with Sri Ramakrishna

things.name: Kalighat Kali Temple
things.description: One of the 51 Shakti Peethas - among the most sacred Hindu sites in India

things.name: College Street Book Market
things.description: The largest second-hand book market in the world with millions of titles

things.name: Motherhouse of the Missionaries of Charity
things.description: Mother Teresa's home and burial place - a place of pilgrimage and reflection

things.name: Indian Museum
things.description: Oldest museum in Asia with remarkable collections of art, archaeology and natural history

things.name: Kumartuli
things.description: The potters' quarter where craftspeople create elaborate Hindu festival idols

things.name: Princep Ghat & Eden Gardens
things.description: Colonial riverside promenade and the famous 66,000-seat cricket ground

things.name: Sundarbans Tiger Reserve
things.description: Day trip to UNESCO World Heritage mangrove delta home to the Bengal tiger
